\tzpentry{ID5512}{Varepsilon Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5512 introduces Varepsilon Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \varepsilon_{0.95}=\sqrt{\frac{\ln(2/0.05)}{2N_c}}, \qquad p\in[\hat p-\varepsilon_{0.95},\hat p+\varepsilon_{0.95}]\cap[0,1]. \label{eq:hoeffding} \end{equation}
